name: Secret Six Samurai - Doji
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>影</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かげ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ドウジ
desc: When another "Six Samurai" monster is Normal or Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can send 1 "Six Samurai" card from your Deck to the GY. If exactly 1 "Six Samurai" monster you control (and no other cards) would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.
mnst_eff: When another "Six Samurai" monster is Normal or Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can send 1 "Six Samurai" card from your Deck to the GY. If exactly 1 "Six Samurai" monster you control (and no other cards) would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.
eff: When another "Six Samurai" monster is Normal or Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can send 1 "Six Samurai" card from your Deck to the GY. If exactly 1 "Six Samurai" monster you control (and no other cards) would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
